evals.prompt: 帮我验证 python-code 这个 skill 的结构是否正确
evals.expected_output: 运行 validate_skill 脚本，输出验证结果，包括名称格式、描述长度、目录结构等检查项
assertions: Uses validate_skill script to check the skill structure
Reports validation results with specific checks (name, description, directory)
Provides actionable feedback if issues are found

evals.prompt: 我想评估 python-code skill 的质量，看看它的 evals 表现如何
evals.expected_output: 找到 evals.json，运行 evals，捕获输出，对照 assertions 评分，生成 benchmark 报告
assertions: Locates and reads the skill's evals/evals.json
Runs evals both with and without the skill (baseline comparison)
Grades results against assertions from evals.json
Produces benchmark data with pass_rate statistics

evals.prompt: 比较 python-code skill 两次评估运行的结果，看看有没有退步
evals.expected_output: 加载两次运行结果，比较 pass_rate 变化，识别回归和改进，生成差异报告
assertions: Loads results from both evaluation runs
Compares pass rates per eval between the two runs
Identifies regressions (pass rate decreased) and improvements (pass rate increased)
Generates a diff report showing per-eval changes
